title: Glasgow Prestwick Airport Aims to Enhance UK-India Trade

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport has hosted the Consul General of India as part of its efforts to bolster trade links between the UK and India. The visit highlighted the airport's potential to support increased trade flows between the two countries, particularly in the logistics and supply chain sector.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The focus on enhancing trade relations with India is part of Glasgow Prestwick's broader strategy to expand its market presence. By showcasing its logistics capabilities, the airport aims to attract more business opportunities, potentially benefiting both regional and national economies.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Prestwick showcases cool chain capability to India
